Notice Of Motion And Motion For Truth Of Matters In Request For Admissions Be Deemed Admitted And Award Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Feb-09-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff William Dubayah's motion for and order to deem certain matters admitted. Denied in light of the prior agreement of the parties as to the filing of the answer, the use of the specified discovery, and the admission of liability. The request for monetary sanctions is denied, if either party seeks to contest the tentative ruling, notice shall be given to appear on Tuesday, February 13, 2007 at 9:00 a.m.
Parties did not give notice. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

Notice Of Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents And Award Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Feb-09-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff William Dubayah's motion to compel responses to form interrogatories and request for production of documents.
Denied in light of the prior agreement of the parties as to the filing of the answer, the use of the specified discovery, and the admission of liability. The request for monetary sanctions is denied, if either party seeks to contest the tentative ruling, notice shall be given to appear on Tuesday, February 13, 2007 at 9:00 a.m.
Parties did not give notice 2/9/07. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.
